kp1:2.1: I go to the Buddha for refuge.
kp1:2.2: I go to the Dhamma for refuge.
kp1:2.3: I go to the Saṅgha for refuge.
kp1:3.1: A second time I go to the Buddha for refuge.
kp1:3.2: A second time I go to the Dhamma for refuge.
kp1:3.3: A second time I go to the Saṅgha for refuge.
kp1:4.1: A third time I go to the Buddha for refuge.
kp1:4.2: A third time I go to the Dhamma for refuge.
kp1:4.3: A third time I go to the Saṅgha for refuge.
